'''Stephin''' was a security expert and a friend of [[Cilia Dil]]. He accompanied Cilia, [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Aeran]] on a secret mission to [[Delaluna]] to steal the plans for the [[Annihilator (superweapon)|Annihilator]] to free [[Junction V]] from the oppression of the Guardians.

{{Char-stub}}
